name: GoGold Resources Inc.
description: GoGold Resources Inc. is a Canada-based silver and gold producer focused on operating, developing, and exploring projects in Mexico. The company's flagship properties include the Parral Tailings project, a producing silver-gold heap leach operation, and the Los Ricos district, which consists of two major exploration and development projects: Los Ricos South and Los Ricos North. GoGold is dedicated to building shareholder value through efficient production and significant exploration potential in historic mining districts.
